docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-08-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-31-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEES, MAURYNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOLLAND, PATRICK DBA. HOLLAND PLUMBING WORKS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEES, MAURYNE
